name: Better Guacamole
description: A fresh and vibrant homemade guacamole made with ripe avocados, red onion, lime juice, and tomato.
instructions: Using a knife, cut avocados in half and remove pits.
Using spoon, scoop out green flesh into a medium sized non-reactive bowl.
Using a potato masher or a fork, mash the avocados.
Add chopped onion, lime juice, salt, and pepper.
Mix with a spatula until well combined.
Using a clean spoon, taste the guacamole and add more lime juice, salt, or pepper to your taste.
Chop tomato and mix in with guacamole if serving immediately.
If not serving immediately, store tomatoes in an air tight container and mix into guacamole right before serving.
